name: An UPDATE VALID before CREATE creates the RTP in the database
description: UPDATE VALID before any CREATE creates a new RTP; the RTP must be retrievable from the database
descriptionHtml: UPDATE VALID before any CREATE creates a new RTP; the RTP must be retrievable from the database

labels.name: story
labels.value: Consumer sends an UPDATE VALID before CREATE
